zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Traves於1040年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易e內特-特雷維-瑙爾特時，他的父親Seigneur Hugh de Treves or Traves30歲，母親Walfran de Centville de Vernon33歲。他於1064年與Gwendama DE BAUGE在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易e內特-特雷維-瑙爾特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1098年在法國福朗-可特艾豪-薩o特拉福斯享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Traves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Travis
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): from Old French and Middle English travers, also Middle English travas, travis, a word with several meanings. It may denote a toll paid for the right to cross a boundary or bridge, the surname perhaps being for someone who paid or collected such tolls. Alternatively, it may mean ‘crosswise, sideways’ or ‘dispute, disagreement’. The Old French word also had the sense ‘crossing, passage’, and it is more than likely that the surname is Norman in origin, for someone who lived at a crossing place or at a place so named (compare French Travers 3). The presence of the preposition ‘de’ (and perhaps also ‘le’) in early forms of the surname appears to indicate a topographic or habitational explanation, but the French preposition and definite article were sometimes added gratuitously to Norman surnames as a sign of their high social status. See also Travers 1.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Traves was born in 1040, in Chênehutte-Trèves-Cunault, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Seigneur Hugh de Treves or Traves, was 30 and his mother, Walfran de Centville de Vernon, was 33. He married Gwendama DE BAUGE in 1064, in Chênehutte-Trèves-Cunault, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1098, in Traves, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 58.

Il a épousé Gwendama DE BAUGE en 1064, à Chênehutte-Trèves-Cunault, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.
